metadata.title: Carolina Jofre Pfeil - Senior UX Designer & CX Strategist | London, UK
metadata.description: Portfolio of Carolina Jofre Pfeil — Senior UX Designer and CX Strategist with 15+ years of experience. Chilean-German designer based in London working with global brands like LEGO, Samsung, Barclays, and J&J.
metadata.aboutDescription: Chilean-German UX Designer and CX Strategist based in London with 15+ years across agencies, startups, and enterprise in Chile, the UK, and internationally. Speaks English, Spanish, German, and Italian.
metadata.workDescription: Selected UX design and CX strategy case studies for global brands including LEGO, Barclays, Samsung, and J&J. End-to-end product design, service design, and brand experience projects.
metadata.contactDescription: Get in touch with Carolina Jofre Pfeil for UX design, CX strategy, or design consultancy. Available for projects globally.

hero.description: I design experiences that bridge business strategy and human insight. 15+ years shaping end-to-end digital products for global brands — from CX strategy through high-fidelity UI to production delivery.

home.capabilitiesIntro: From research to strategy to production-ready design — I work across the full experience lifecycle.
home.aboutTeaser: A curious CX consultant and designer with 15+ years across agencies, startups, and enterprise — in Chile and the UK.
home.aboutTeaserDetail: My customer-centric work has helped people and organisations explore new ways to deliver value and reignite growth. I believe the best design decisions come from understanding both the human need and the business constraint — then finding the creative tension between them.

work.title: Selected Work
work.intro: A curated selection of projects where I helped organisations solve business problems through design. Each case study goes deep on context, decisions, and outcomes.

about.title: About Me
about.bio1: I'm a curious CX consultant and designer with relevant experience in digital design, brand strategy, and business innovation. My customer-centric work has helped people and organisations explore new ways to deliver value and reignite growth.
about.bio2: My experience encompasses developing and launching end-to-end design projects as well as getting involved at different stages of the problem-solving process. Playing a hands-on role, my work is tangible, co-creative, and cross-functional.
about.bio3: Chilean-German by heritage, London-based by choice. Over fifteen years, I've collaborated with teams and partnered with clients across Chile and the United Kingdom — working independently and with agencies such as Interbrand, Oliver, Grey, and Daw. I speak English, Spanish, German, and some Italian. Today, I'm a Senior UX Designer at Konrad Group in London, currently embedded within a leading UK retailer's product team working on financial services UX.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.intro: Whether you have a project in mind, need a design strategist, or just want to connect — I'd love to hear from you.
contact.sentDetail: Thanks for reaching out. I'll get back to you soon.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try emailing me directly.

footer.tagline: Senior UX Designer & CX Strategist based in London. Shaping experiences where design strategy meets human insight.
